allowed_wording: In the controlled GSM8K Light GPU n100 run, CC-DFlash-R2 with the light GPU compressor achieved lower average compression overhead than the CPU-compressor references.
Task100B provides bounded evidence of lower e2e time relative to Task96 CPU references.
claims.final_report_recommendation: Use bounded GSM8K Light GPU speed evidence language only.
claims.remaining_limitation: No full matrix, no QMSum, and reference sample sizes differ.
supporting_evidence: Task96 CPU references are bounded references, not equal-setting n100 controls.

allowed_wording: Task100B achieved 79/100 calibrated strict GSM8K numeric proxy under deterministic evaluation.
Quality evidence is deterministic GSM8K proxy evidence.
claims.final_report_recommendation: Label quality as deterministic GSM8K numeric proxy evidence.
claims.remaining_limitation: No LLM judge, no semantic evaluation, 15 cap-limited rows, and 6 wrong numeric rows.

allowed_wording: Task100B completed on the local RTX 4070 Laptop GPU with max reserved VRAM around 4.431641GiB and no recorded OOM/CUDA failure.
claims.final_report_recommendation: Use local feasibility wording, not readiness wording.
claims.remaining_limitation: Single local machine/run, no stress/load testing, and no deployment environment validation.
supporting_evidence: Task100B metadata confirmed light + cuda + local_files_only.

allowed_wording: QMSum remains outside the Task100B Light GPU n100 claim.
blocked_wording: Long-context semantic QA quality is solved.
claims.final_report_recommendation: Keep QMSum language diagnostic-only and outside the Light GPU n100 claim.
claims.remaining_limitation: No QMSum rerun in the Phase 2 light GPU path.
supporting_evidence: Task100C kept QMSum semantic correctness in the risk register.

allowed_wording: DFlash-R1 is retained as a historical reference.
blocked_wording: Task100B is apples-to-apples with Task88 DFlash-R1.
claims.final_report_recommendation: Reference DFlash-R1 only as historical context.

allowed_wording: Light GPU placement is a promising candidate.
blocked_wording: GPU placement is now the default.
claims.final_report_recommendation: Keep GPU placement described as runtime/gated, not default.
claims.remaining_limitation: Default config remains CPU; large CPU remains historical/control reference.
supporting_evidence: Task99-R and Task100B used runtime compressor-device override.
Task100A retained large CPU as historical/control reference.

allowed_wording: Task100B completed one Light GPU n100 controlled run.
claims.final_report_recommendation: Do not label Task100B as a full benchmark.
claims.remaining_limitation: Only one condition, one dataset, one compressor profile.
supporting_evidence: Task100B ran one condition: CC-DFlash-R2 Light GPU on GSM8K mnt256.
Task100B did not run Baseline-AR, DFlash-R1, large CPU n100, QMSum, or a full matrix.
